posts.text:
Ajay, you have been a great leader and appreciate all you do for our community and for so many Democratic national leaders.


Ajay Jain Bhutoria (@ajainb)

Unforgettable energy at the Rajasthan Association Holi!🌈 So fun getting some color on Congressman @RoKhanna. I’m deeply grateful for Ro’s tireless dedication to our district and the nation. We are lucky to have such a visionary and hardworking National leader and friend. #Holi



— https://nitter.net/ajainb/status/2033318817871626263#m
Happy Holi! Loved celebrating at the ICC. Over 1000 expected to attend. So much vibrancy and joy in the community and good to be with friends back home away from the divisions in DC.

Brit, didn't you cheerlead us into the war in Iraq?


Brit Hume (@brithume)

The implication of the "imminent threat" standard is that a nation must wait until it is in urgent danger before it can act.



— https://nitter.net/brithume/status/2033258449740447959#m

I was a proud early endorser of @KatAbughazaleh when no one gave her a shot. Now she can win. @MarkRuffalo is right — we must do everything to help her overcome millions in Super PAC funding and send her to Congress.

Video
  




Popstonox (@Popstonox)

Mark Ruffalo endorses Kat Abughazaleh for IL-09

"Don't let AIPAC buy our politicians.

Vote for Kat. Vote for a politician who will be working for you, not a foreign entity who drags us into wars and cares nothing for the American people"

Vide

You know the illegal war in Iran is a disaster when the FCC chair is threatening to revoke broadcaster licenses unless they censor. Too many Americans have died & gas prices are skyrocketing.

What's next? Censor X posts, FB, TikTok, Instagram. You can't hide the truth. nytimes.com/2026/03/14/world… via @NYTimes

Packed town hall with over 300 people in San Jose. Strongly condemned the antisemitic beating of the men speaking Hebrew in our district & the antisemitic attack on Temple Israel in Michigan. Also spoke about releasing the Epstein files & over $13 million in funds I brought home.

We could fully fund the IDEA act's 40 percent commitment to special education instead of the 12% the federal government currently provides for the amount 20 days of this illegal war in Iran is costing Americans.


Ro Khanna (@RoKhanna)

Proud to speak to nearly 100 school board members and education leaders from our district this morning and answer questions. We spoke about the need to fully fund special needs education and the millions I have brought in projects for students and families in our

Proud to speak to nearly 100 school board members and education leaders from our district this morning and answer questions. We spoke about the need to fully fund special needs education and the millions I have brought in projects for students and families in our district this year.

Jurgen Habermas, one of the world's greatest philosophers, passed away today. These words are my north star.

"If any trace of utopianism remains in me, it lies solely in the belief that democracy—and public debate in its optimal forms—has the capacity to cut the Gordian knot of problems that would otherwise be practically insoluble.” 

The greatest honor of my life was having him read and blurb my book, Dignity in a Digital Age.

I mean I did study economics
under Becker & Lucas at Chicago and taught economics for four years as a visiting lecturer at Stanford! But I am not sure the Chicago Economics Department would be proud of that. Ha!


Bay Area New Liberals 🌐 (@BayAreaNewLibs)

When this guy is the voice of sanity, we've definitely lost the mandate of heaven.



— https://nitter.net/BayAreaNewLibs/status/2032628322887413933#m

So how will we pay for single payer healthcare? One of the things I admire about Bernie Sanders is he is honest that people need to pay taxes to fund foundational social services in healthcare, education, & childcare. The taxes should be progressive. But the math needs to work.


Katie Porter (@katieporterca)

0% state income tax for California families making under $100,000. That’s thousands of dollars back in your pocket where it belongs.

As Governor, I’ll work the issue at both ends—lowe

I was with @Carlos_E_Espina last month and saw vendors at the Broadacres Market in Nevada have to pass out "Know Your Rights" cards to protect immigrants from ICE abuse.

Video
